overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a survival horror game showing a character in a dark trench coat and hat walking along a snowy, foggy mountain path at night. The character traverses stone bridges and wooded areas with atmospheric blue-purple lighting, briefly encountering another figure on the trail.

events.description: another character in dark clothing appears on the left and walks past the ego

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path between high stone walls, approaching a lamp post

leafless trees visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow, snow-covered mountain path flanked by high stone retaining walls. The character walks steadily forward as fog obscures the distant castle silhouette. Another figure in dark clothing passes by on the left, walking in the opposite direction, while a lamp post glows warmly on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded trail transitioning to stone bridge crossing

events.description: camera zooms in close to the character's back then returns to normal distance
character steps onto and crosses a stone bridge with snow-covered railings

agents.ego_description: walking through denser woods and crossing a stone bridge over a ravine

entered.detail: stone bridge with snow-covered railings crossing a gap
another lamp post visible in the distance along the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a more wooded area with bare trees surrounding the trail. The camera briefly zooms in close to the character's back before the character crosses a stone bridge with heavy snow on its railings. The stone walls fall away as the environment becomes more natural and forested.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated mountain trail with stone wall and forest

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated path with a stone wall on the left and snow-covered trees on the right

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible through the mist in the distance

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the path continues along an elevated trail with the stone wall returning on the left side. Snow-covered trees line the right side of the path while distant mountain peaks become visible through the fog ahead. The character maintains a steady walking pace along the winding trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain vista with snow fields

events.description: character turns left to look up at the snow-covered trees and sky
character approaches and passes another figure standing on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: pauses to look at the surrounding trees and mountains, then continues walking past another figure on the path

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing on the path ahead, passed by the ego

entered.detail: open snow-covered field or meadow visible to the right
snow-laden evergreen trees with heavy white coverage on branches

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wide mountain vista with expansive views of snow-covered fields and distant peaks. The character turns to observe the snow-laden pine trees before continuing along the path. Another figure appears in the distance ahead, standing on the trail as the character approaches and passes by, with the landscape opening up to reveal the full scope of the mountainous environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain trail that evolves from a confined stone corridor into an expansive alpine vista. It begins on a narrow path flanked by high stone retaining walls where the character passes a mysterious figure under the warm glow of a lamp post. As the character moves forward, the stone walls give way to a wooded area of bare trees, and the camera zooms in close before the character crosses a snow-laden stone bridge. The scene then shifts back to an elevated trail with a returning stone wall on the left, winding past snow-covered trees as distant mountain peaks emerge through the fog. Finally, the path opens into a wide vista of snow-covered fields and pine trees, where the character passes another distant figure while the full scope of the mountainous environment is revealed.
